sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, str1 String, str2 String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_strings SET str1 = str1 || ' ' || str2 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT str1 || ', ' || str2 AS concatenated_string FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE str1 || str2 LIKE '%lo%';
